project_name: CampusCare AI - Student Support Message Triage
task_type: 4-class text classification for educational support routing
important_note: Educational prototype only. Not a clinical diagnostic or crisis-intervention tool.

normal.meaning: Positive/neutral student message or low support need

academic_stress.meaning: Study pressure, deadlines, exam worry, burnout signals without urgent risk

emotional_distress.meaning: Persistent sadness, hopelessness, isolation, emotional decline requiring counselor review

urgent_human_review.meaning: Message suggests immediate safety concern and must be reviewed by a trained human immediately
